query_normalized: llmxive follow-up: extending "sciatlas: a large-scale knowledge graph for automated scientific resea" computer science
rationale: This paper satisfies criteria (d) and (f) as it provides foundational methodology and canonical techniques (Graph Machine Learning, Knowledge Graph completion, and embedding generation) that are directly relevant to extending a large-scale scientific knowledge graph like SciAtlas. While it uses a COVID-19 case study, the core mechanism of improving graph embeddings via knowledge completion is the essential prior work required for any research extending scientific knowledge graphs.
